open_p0_titles: [P0-001] Fix arq worker job registration (WorkerSettings.functions empty)
[P0-002] Fix RunEvent sequence_num race (unique constraint violations under concurrency)
[P0-003] Make local stack boot reliably (redis profile / env defaults / docs)
[P0-004] Add tenant_id to core tables (runs, artifacts, manifests, pointers) and enforce isolation
[P0-005] Add production Dockerfiles (api + ui) and minimal CI build step
